title: TC-DFU-FAIL-001: Verify DFU failure does NOT mark headset as 'Up to Date' — app restart scenario
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to the Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC device.
2. Navigate: tap [Device Name] → Settings → Software Update.
3. Verify the current firmware version displayed for the headset (note it, e.g., v1.0.0).
4. Initiate a firmware update by tapping 'Check for Updates' and then 'Update' if a newer version is available (e.g., v1.2.0).
5. During the DFU process, force a failure by one of the following methods:
a. Move the headset out of Bluetooth range (30+ feet away) during the firmware transfer phase.
b. OR place the headset in the charge case and close the lid during the update.
6. Wait for the update process to complete/fail. Observe the on-screen result.
7. If the app shows a 'Houston' error screen or 'Update Failed' dialog, DO NOT tap Retry. Instead, force-close the app (swipe from recents).
8. Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app and reconnect to the device.
9. Navigate: tap [Device Name] → Settings → Software Update.
10. Observe the status displayed for the headset firmware version.
expected: The Software Update screen MUST show the headset's firmware version as the ORIGINAL version (e.g., v1.0.0), NOT the target version (v1.2.0). The app MUST NOT display 'Up to Date' or 'Firmware is up to date'. The 'Check for Updates' or 'Update' button MUST be available to allow a retry.

title: TC-DFU-FAIL-002: Verify DFU failure does NOT falsely mark charge stand as updated
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to the Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC device.
2. Navigate: tap [Device Name] → Settings → Software Update.
3. Note the current firmware versions for BOTH the headset AND the charge stand/case.
4. Initiate a firmware update that includes updates for both the headset and the charge stand.

5. During the update, induce a failure (e.g., press and hold the Bluetooth button on the device for 10 seconds to force a reset, OR disconnect the phone's Bluetooth from the device in phone settings).
6. Wait for the update process to terminate. Observe the result screen.
7. If a failure/error screen appears, dismiss it (tap Cancel or close the app).
8. Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app and reconnect to the device.
9. Navigate: tap [Device Name] → Settings → Software Update.
10. Observe the firmware version displayed for the charge stand/case.
expected: The charge stand/case firmware version MUST still show its ORIGINAL version (the version noted in step 3). The app MUST NOT display 'Up to Date' for the charge stand. The charge stand MUST NOT be falsely marked as having been updated.

title: TC-DFU-FAIL-003: Verify retry mechanism is NOT blocked after DFU failure — 'Update' button remains available
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to the Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC device.
2. Navigate: tap [Device Name] → Settings → Software Update.
3. Verify a newer firmware version is available (if not, this test requires a device with an updatable firmware).
4. Tap 'Update' to start the DFU process.
5. During the firmware transfer (e.g., at ~30-50% progress), trigger a failure by turning off the headset (press and hold the call button for 5 seconds to power off).
6. Wait for the update to fail. Observe the on-screen result.
7. If a 'Houston' error screen appears with 'Retry' and 'Cancel' buttons, tap 'Cancel'.
8. If the app returns to the Software Update screen without an error dialog, observe the status.
9. Tap the 'Check for Updates' button or the 'Update' button (whichever is available).
10. Observe the message/behavior when attempting to retry the update.
expected: The app MUST allow the user to retry the update. Tapping 'Check for Updates' or 'Update' MUST initiate a new update attempt. The app MUST NOT display a misleading message such as 'Firmware is up to date', 'No updates available', or 'Already up to date'. The retry mechanism MUST NOT be blocked.

title: TC-DFU-FAIL-004: Verify app does NOT show 'Up to Date' for headset after DFU failure at 99% progress
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to the Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC device.
2. Navigate: tap [Device Name] → Settings → Software Update.
3. Note the current headset firmware version (e.g., v1.0.0).
4. Initiate a firmware update to a newer version (e.g., v1.2.0).
5. Allow the update to progress to 99% (near completion of the transfer/installation phase).
6. At 99%, force a disconnection: go to phone Settings → Bluetooth → tap the connected Poly device → 'Forget' or 'Disconnect'.
7. Wait 30 seconds. Reconnect to the device via Bluetooth.
8. Open Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate: tap [Device Name] → Settings → Software Update.
9. Observe the firmware version and status displayed for the headset.
10. Tap 'Check for Updates' and observe the result.
expected: The headset firmware version MUST still display the ORIGINAL version (v1.0.0), NOT the target version (v1.2.0). The app MUST NOT display 'Up to Date' or 'Firmware is up to date'. The 'Check for Updates' or 'Update' button MUST be functional and allow a retry of the update.

title: TC-DFU-FAIL-005: Verify app update status tracking does NOT desynchronize from actual firmware after DFU failure + reconnect cycle
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to the Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC device.
2. Navigate: tap [Device Name] → Settings → Software Update.
3. Record the actual firmware versions for headset and charge stand from the app UI.
4. Initiate a firmware update for both headset and charge stand.
5. During the update, induce a failure by placing the headset in the charge case and closing the lid for 15 seconds, then removing it.
6. Observe the failure/error screen. Dismiss it.
7. Without restarting the app, navigate away: tap back arrow to go to Device screen, then tap [Device Name] → Settings → Software Update again.
8. Observe the firmware versions displayed.
9. Now force-close the app (swipe from recents).
10. Reopen the app, reconnect, and navigate back to Software Update.
11. Observe the firmware versions again.
12. Power cycle the headset (turn off, wait 10 seconds, turn on).
13. Reconnect and navigate back to Software Update.
14. Observe the firmware versions a third time.
15. Compare all observed versions across steps 8, 11, and 14 with the original versions from step 3.
expected: At ALL observation points (steps 8, 11, 14), the firmware versions for BOTH the headset and charge stand MUST match the ORIGINAL versions recorded in step 3. The app MUST NOT show any version as updated. The app MUST NOT display 'Up to Date' for either component. The update status tracking MUST remain synchronized with the actual firmware on the devices.

title: TC-DFU-FAIL-006: Verify DFU failure does NOT block retry after app force-kill and relaunch
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to the Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC device.
2. Navigate: tap [Device Name] → Settings → Software Update.
3. Verify a newer firmware version is available. Note the current version.
4. Tap 'Update' to start the DFU process.
5. During the update (at any progress point), force-kill the app (swipe from recents).
6. Wait 10 seconds.
7. Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app and reconnect to the device.
8. Navigate: tap [Device Name] → Settings → Software Update.
9. Observe the status text and firmware version displayed for the headset.
10. Tap 'Check for Updates' or the available update button.
11. Observe the result.
expected: The app MUST display the ORIGINAL firmware version (not the target version). The app MUST NOT display 'Up to Date' or 'Firmware is up to date'. Tapping 'Check for Updates' or the update button MUST initiate a new firmware update attempt. The retry mechanism MUST be fully functional after an app force-kill during DFU.

title: TC-DFU-FAIL-007: Verify DFU failure with low battery does NOT falsely mark headset as updated
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to the Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC device.
2. Navigate: tap [Device Name] → Settings → Software Update.
3. Note the current headset firmware version.
4. Ensure the headset battery is low (10-15%) and the charge stand battery is also low.
5. Initiate a firmware update by tapping 'Check for Updates' and then 'Update'.
6. Allow the update to start. Observe if the app shows a low battery warning.
7. If a low battery warning appears, dismiss it and continue (or the update may fail automatically due to low battery).
8. Wait for the update process to complete or fail.
9. Observe the final screen. If an error appears, dismiss it.
10. Navigate: tap back → [Device Name] → Settings → Software Update.
11. Observe the firmware version and status for the headset.
12. Tap 'Check for Updates' and observe the result.
expected: The headset firmware version MUST still show the ORIGINAL version. The app MUST NOT display 'Up to Date'. The 'Check for Updates' or 'Update' button MUST be available and functional for retrying the update after charging the device.

title: TC-DFU-FAIL-008: Verify DFU failure during charge stand update does NOT falsely mark charge stand as updated while headset shows correctly
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to the Poly Voyager Free 60+ UC device.
2. Navigate: tap [Device Name] → Settings → Software Update.
3. Record the firmware versions for both headset (e.g., v1.0.0) and charge stand (e.g., v1.0.0).
4. Initiate a firmware update that updates the charge stand firmware.

5. During the charge stand update phase (after headset update completes, or during the charge stand portion), induce a failure by removing the headset from the charge case and moving out of Bluetooth range.
6. Wait for the update to fail. Observe the error screen.
7. Dismiss the error screen (tap Cancel if available, or close and reopen the app).
8. Navigate: tap [Device Name] → Settings → Software Update.
9. Observe the firmware version displayed for the charge stand.
10. Observe the firmware version displayed for the headset.
11. Tap 'Check for Updates' and observe the result for both components.
expected: The charge stand firmware version MUST still show its ORIGINAL version (v1.0.0). The headset firmware version MUST also show its ORIGINAL version (v1.0.0) if its update also failed, OR the updated version if the headset update completed successfully before the charge stand update began. The app MUST NOT display 'Up to Date' for the charge stand. The update button MUST be available to retry the charge stand update.
